name: Scapegoat Punishment - TG TF / Gender Transformation
description:
(CW: Gender Transformation, Objectification)
One would do well to never run afoul of a transformation-happy witch, but what happens if someone who looks a lot like you does, and lets you take the fall for it instead?
Now you've been transformed into a girl, and tasked with having sex with a man in one week- or else the change is permanent!

(Inspired in concept by many old-school TG caption tropes, but in particular inspired by Sapphirefoxx's work.)
creator: Orbital_Lithium
